ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_start" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the experimental protocol used */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment's purpose and objectives */,
  "experiment_methodology" TEXT /* Details about the experimental design and methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logged record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this record belongs to */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Replicate number for the logged data */,
  "log_volume1" REAL /* Logarithmic volume measurement (first type) */,
  "log_quality" REAL /* Logarithmic quality measurement */,
  "log_volume2" REAL /* Logarithmic volume measurement (second type) */,
  "log_vm" REAL /* Measured maximum velocity */,
  "log_km" REAL /* Measured Michaelis constant */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "protocol_developer" TEXT /* Name of the person or team that developed the protocol */,
  "protocol_validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was validated */,
  "protocol_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, graphical) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_results_file" TEXT /* File containing the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experimental findings */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the experiment */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the result has been published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was published */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QA entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assurance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the check */,
  "qa_status" TEXT /* Status of the QA check (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "qa_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the QA check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, QA failure, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being commented on */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., comment, suggestion, issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)
